Bash(mysql -uroot -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 aviation_food_recommend -e "SELECT id, openid, name, id_number, cabin_type, current_flight_id, preference_completed, meal_type_preferences, flavor_preferences FROM user WHERE id_number = '510411200309180910' OR id = 125")

Bash(mysql -uroot -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 aviation_food_recommend -e "SELECT id, flight_number, departure, destination, departure_time, arrival_time, selection_deadline, meal_count FROM flight_info WHERE id = \(SELECT current_flight_id FROM user WHERE id = 51\)")

Bash(mysql -uroot -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 aviation_food_recommend -e "SELECT id, name, CHAR_LENGTH\(pic\) as pic_len FROM dish WHERE pic IS NOT NULL AND pic != '' ORDER BY pic_len DESC LIMIT 5")
Bash(mysql -uroot -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 aviation_food_recommend -e "SELECT id, name, pic FROM dish WHERE pic IS NOT NULL AND pic != '' AND pic NOT LIKE '/static/dish/%' LIMIT 5")
Bash(mysql -uroot -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 aviation_food_recommend -e "UPDATE dish SET pic = NULL WHERE pic LIKE '[%'")
Bash(mysql -uroot -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 aviation_food_recommend -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM recommendation_log LIKE 'algorithm%'")
Bash(mysql -uroot -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 aviation_food_recommend -e "UPDATE dish SET pic = NULL; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM dish WHERE pic IS NOT NULL;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 aviation_food_recommend -e "SELECT id, name, pic FROM dish WHERE pic IS NOT NULL AND pic != '' LIMIT 5")
